title: digitaria debilis
intro: Digitaria debilis, also known as Weak Finger Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Digitaria debilis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. It can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and is also used as a poultice to apply directly to the affected area.
